popularStory.headline: Humbert III de Savoie (1136-1189)
popularStory.description: Humbert III de Maurienne ou dit plus couramment Humbert III de Savoie, dit « le Bienheureux » ou « le Saint », né le 1er avril ou 1er août 1136 au château d'Aveillane et mort le 4 mars 1189 à Chambéry …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Humbert III de Savoie於1136年8月4日出生在義大利皮蒙特托利諾阿維格利亞納時，他的父親Amédée de Savoie III41歲，母親Mathilde d'Albon40歲。他於1151年與Faydive de Toulouse在法國薩伏伊結婚。他去世於1189年3月4日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利享年52歲，埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉皮-德-爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humbert III de Savoie于1136年8月4日出生在意大利皮蒙特托利諾阿維格利亞納时，他的父亲Amédée de Savoie III41岁，母亲Mathilde d'Albon40岁。他于1151年与Faydive de Toulouse在法国薩伏伊结婚。他去世于1189年3月4日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利享年52岁，埋葬在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉皮-德-爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Savoie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

variants.name: Savoy
meanings: Altered form of French   Savoie  . It is also found in England, as an Anglicized surname of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Savoia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

nameMeanings.name: Humbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. However, it was not common in Britain in the Middle Ages, and has always had a Continental flavour. It was used by Vladimir Nabokov for the name of the demented pederast, Humbert Humbert , who is the narrator in his novel Lolita ( 1955 ).

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Humbert III de Savoie was born on 4 August 1136, in Avigliana, Turin, Piedmont, Italy, his father, Amédée de Savoie III, was 41 and his mother, Mathilde d'Albon, was 40. He married Faydive de Toulouse in 1151, in Savoie, France. He died on 4 March 1189, in Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 52, and was buried in Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France.

historicEvents.description: Toponyme Lémenc : Cette colline est la première occupation humaine, l'établissement implanté dans l'actuel quartier du Lémenc à Chambéry serait attesté sous la forme Lemencum à l'époque antique. Ce nom de Lémenc est ensuite mentionné au IVsiècle sous la forme Leminco, puis encore Lemenco en 1138. Il s'analyse sur la base d'un radical Lemo- qui semble être le nom gaulois de l'orme(cf Lémovices), dérivé avec un suffixe -incu(m)d'origine ligure que l'on retrouve de la Provence et du Massif central aux Alpes. Le sens global serait celui de « domaine des ormes ».

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humbert III de Savoie est né le 4 août 1136, à Avigliana, Torino, Piemonte, Italie, son père, Amédée de Savoie III, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mathilde d'Albon, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Faydive de Toulouse en 1151, à Savoie, France. Il est décédé le 4 mars 1189, à Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humbert III de Savoie am 4. August 1136 in Avigliana, Torino, Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Amédée de Savoie III 41 und seine Mutter Mathilde d'Albon 40. Er hat 1151 in Savoyen, Frankreich Faydive de Toulouse geheiratet. Er starb am 4. März 1189 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Humbert III de Savoie è nato il il 4 agosto 1136 nel Avigliana, Torino, Piemonte, Italia, il suo padre, Amédée de Savoie III, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde d'Albon, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Faydive de Toulouse nel 1151, nel Savoia, Francia. Morì il 4 marzo 1189, nel Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Humbert III de Savoieが1136年8月4日にイタリアピエモントトリノアヴィグリアナで生まれた時，父Amédée de Savoie IIIは41歳，母Mathilde d'Albonは40歳であった。1151年にフランスサボイでFaydive de Toulouseと結婚した。彼は1189年3月4日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスサボイチャンブeリーで52歳で死去し，フランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイサイント-パエレ-デ-クウルティルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Humbert III de Savoie(이)가 1136년 8월 4일 이탈리아 피몽 토리노 아비그리아나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Amédée de Savoie III(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde d'Albon(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1151년 프랑스 서아보이에서 Faydive de Toulouse(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1189년 3월 4일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 서아보이 챔브e리에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이 세인트-피레-데-커틸에 묻혔다.

mn.4 agosto 1136–4 MAR 1189: 1136 оны Наймдугаар сарын 4–1189 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 4

pt.4 agosto 1136–4 MAR 1189: 4 de agosto de 1136–4 de março de 1189
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humbert III de Savoie nasceu em 4 de agosto de 1136, em Avigliana, Torino, Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, Amédée de Savoie III, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde d'Albon, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Faydive de Toulouse em 1151, em Savoie, França. Ele faleceu em 4 de março de 1189, em Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humbert III de Savoie родился 4 августа 1136 г. в местности авигляна, торино, пиемонт, Италия, его отцу по имени Amédée de Savoie III было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilde d'Albon, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Faydive de Toulouse в 1151 г. в местности савои, Франция. Он умер 4 марта 1189 г. в местности чамбeри, савои, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-пьирре-де-куртилл, савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

sm.from 1148 to 4 March 1189: mai le 1148 e o'o I le 4 Mati 1189

es.4 agosto 1136–4 MAR 1189: 4 de agosto de 1136–4 de marzo de 1189
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humbert III de Savoie nació el 4 de agosto de 1136, en Avigliana, Torino, Piemonte, Italia, su papá, Amédée de Savoie III, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mathilde d'Albon, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Faydive de Toulouse en 1151, en Savoie, Francia. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1189, en Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
